events.strategy: strong independent critical plan review of the media-volume privilege model, local-POSIX prebind gate, legacy adoption, exact-SHA update and rollback, atomic database/media backup, exact-release restore/recovery, paired retention/purge, redaction, serialized write sets, and real Docker evidence
events.tests: card, plan, integrated media and administrative specs, root/media/Prisma DOX, current Compose/Docker runtime, installer/update/uninstall contracts, container harness scenarios, AC1-AC7 command observability, and failure-boundary consistency inspection

events.strategy: round-1 repair: closed ephemeral helper mount privileges, split pre/post-additive-migration invariants and retained evidence, required PostgreSQL/Nautt credential continuity for retained data, and named the install-lifecycle fixture
events.tests: plan/card/approval consistency, exact AC3 command observability, diff check, and standalone PoP validation

events.strategy: strong independent critical round-2 review of the repaired exact helper mount matrix, migration/evidence boundary, retained PostgreSQL and Nautt credential continuity, executable install-lifecycle fixture, exact-SHA update/rollback, atomic backup/restore, paired retention/purge, Docker evidence, and isolated cleanup topology
events.tests: card, revised plan, prior approval blockers, integrated media and administrative specs, root Compose/install contract, current app runtime network/secret topology, AC1-AC7 observability, and restore-rehearsal feasibility inspection

events.strategy: final round-2 repair: separately inventory exact-release restore health over only disposable restored database/media resources, candidate-only runtime files, isolated DB network, and fail-closed pre-mutation teardown
events.tests: approval blocker trace, closed matrix/restore/AC6 consistency, exact media-restore scenario observability, JSON and diff checks, standalone PoP validation

events.strategy: strong independent decisive round-3 review of the final isolated exact-release restore-health topology and the complete persistent-media operations plan
events.tests: card, full revised plan, two prior return blockers, exact helper mount matrix, manifest-SHA health image, UID/read-only-root/media mount, isolated candidate database network, candidate-only runtime files and callback, deterministic inventory and pre-mutation cleanup, migration boundaries, credential continuity, update/rollback, backup/restore/recovery, retention/purge, AC1-AC7 observability, and circuit-breaker consequence
